description: Visual Studio Code command line interface.

root.name: agent
tip: Start and interact with AI agent hosts.

root.name: chat
tip: Pass in a prompt to run in a chat session in the current working directory.

root.name: serve-web
tip: Run a server that displays the editor UI in browsers.

root.name: tunnel
tip: Make the current machine accessible from vscode.dev or other machines through a secure tunnel.

option.name: --add-mcp
tip: Adds a Model Context Protocol server definition to the user profile.

option.name: --agents
tip: Opens the agents window.

option.name: --category
tip: Filters installed extensions by provided category, when using --list-extensions.

option.name: --disable-chromium-sandbox
tip: Use this option only when there is requirement to launch the application as sudo user on Linux.

option.name: --disable-extension
tip: Disable the provided extension.

option.name: --disable-extensions
tip: Disable all installed extensions.

option.name: --disable-gpu
tip: Disable GPU hardware acceleration.

option.name: --disable-lcd-text
tip: Disable LCD font rendering.

option.name: --enable-proposed-api
tip: Enables proposed API features for extensions.

option.name: --extensions-dir
tip: Set the root path for extensions.

option.name: --inspect-brk-extensions
tip: Allow debugging and profiling of extensions with the extension host being paused after start.

option.name: --inspect-extensions
tip: Allow debugging and profiling of extensions.

option.name: --install-extension
tip: Installs or updates an extension. The argument is either an extension id or a path to a VSIX.

option.name: --list-extensions
tip: List the installed extensions.

option.name: --locale
tip: The locale to use (e.g. en-US or zh-TW).

option.name: --locate-shell-integration-path
tip: Print the path to a terminal shell integration script. Allowed values are 'bash', 'pwsh', 'zsh' or 'fish'.

option.name: --log
tip: Log level to use. Default is 'info'.

option.name: --pre-release
tip: Installs the pre-release version of the extension, when using --install-extension.

option.name: --prof-startup
tip: Run CPU profiler during startup.

option.name: --profile
tip: Opens the provided folder or workspace with the given profile and associates the profile with the workspace.

option.name: --remove
tip: Remove folder(s) from the last active window.

option.name: --show-versions
tip: Show versions of installed extensions, when using --list-extensions.

option.name: --sync
tip: Turn sync on or off.

option.name: --telemetry
tip: Shows all telemetry events which VS code collects.

option.name: --transient
tip: Run with temporary data and extension directories, as if launched for the first time.

option.name: --uninstall-extension
tip: Uninstalls an extension.

option.name: --update-extensions
tip: Update the installed extensions.

option.name: --user-data-dir
tip: Specifies the directory that user data is kept in. Can be used to open multiple distinct instances of Code.

option.name: --verbose
tip: Print verbose output (implies --wait).

option.name: -a
tip: Add folder(s) to the last active window.

option.name: -d
tip: Compare two files with each other.

option.name: -g
tip: Open a file at the path on the specified line and character position.

option.name: -m
tip: Perform a three-way merge by providing paths for two modified versions of a file, the common origin of both modified versions and the output file to save merge results.

option.name: -n
tip: Force to open a new window.

option.name: -r
tip: Force to open a file or folder in an already opened window.

option.name: -s
tip: Print process usage and diagnostics information.

option.name: -w
tip: Wait for the files to be closed before returning.

common_option.name: -h
tip: Show the help.

common_option.name: -v
tip: Show the version.
